category_title: Third-grade boys with E/BD displaying disruptive behaviors during reading instruction
scenario_title: Disruptive behavior during reading instruction and group work
minimal_context: The student is participating in a reading instruction group work activity in a third-grade classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our reading instruction for today. Please open your books and start reading the passage with your group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Hey, what are you guys doing after school today?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's get back to the reading assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Whining) I don't want to do this reading.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to read the passage with your group right now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Laughing loudly while the teacher is talking) No, I'm not doing it! This is stupid!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our reading instruction for today. Please open your books and start reading the passage with your group.

STUDENT: Hey, what are you guys doing after school today?

TUTOR: Let's get back to the reading assignment.

STUDENT: (Whining) I don't want to do this reading.

TUTOR: You need to read the passage with your group right now.

STUDENT: (Laughing loudly while the teacher is talking) No, I'm not doing it! This is stupid!

context.environment: Third-grade inclusive classroom at a school implementing PBIS

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During instruction while the teacher is talking
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Talking in class while the teacher is talking, making noises (i.e., laughing, whining) during instruction, verbally refusing to do work, and using inappropriate language
